g.text: DetectionReason TEXT, -- Why flagged as robot
1. ML model runs periodically (e.g., every hour)
4. Scores above threshold inserted into table
- No new robots detected since last run
- May have more in next run
: Can resume from LastID if interrupted
- Audit trail of AI detections preserved
- AI Robot: Automated, ML-based, ID pagination
- TW Robot: Rule-based, manual, time pagination
